creator: bernd@cicely.de
text:
I have an umlauts file, containing the codes of 128-255.
My systems have LC_CTYPE = de_DE.ISO8859-1

This is how it looks on a functional FreeBSD 10.x system:
[72]cicely1> hexdump -C ~/umlauts 
00000000  80 20 81 20 82 20 83 20  84 20 85 20 86 20 87 20  |. . . . . . . . |
00000010  88 20 89 20 8a 20 8b 20  8c 20 8d 20 8e 20 8f 0a  |. . . . . . . ..|
00000020  90 20 91 20 92 20 93 20  94 20 95 20 96 20 97 20  |. . . . . . . . |
00000030  98 20 99 20 9a 20 9b 20  9c 20 9d 20 9e 20 9f 0a  |. . . . . . . ..|
00000040  a0 20 a1 20 a2 20 a3 20  a4 20 a5 20 a6 20 a7 20  |聽 隆 垄 拢 陇 楼 娄 搂 |
00000050  a8 20 a9 20 aa 20 ab 20  ac 20 ad 20 ae 20 af 0a  |篓 漏 陋 芦 卢 颅 庐 炉.|
00000060  b0 20 b1 20 b2 20 b3 20  b4 20 b5 20 b6 20 b7 20  |掳 卤 虏 鲁 麓 碌 露 路 |
00000070  b8 20 b9 20 ba 20 bb 20  bc 20 bd 20 be 20 bf 0a  |赂 鹿 潞 禄 录 陆 戮 驴.|
00000080  c0 20 c1 20 c2 20 c3 20  c4 20 c5 20 c6 20 c7 20  |脌 脕 脗 脙 脛 脜 脝 脟 |
00000090  c8 20 c9 20 ca 20 cb 20  cc 20 cd 20 ce 20 cf 0a  |脠 脡 脢 脣 脤 脥 脦 脧.|
000000a0  d0 20 d1 20 d2 20 d3 20  d4 20 d5 20 d6 20 d7 20  |脨 脩 脪 脫 脭 脮 脰 脳 |
000000b0  d8 20 d9 20 da 20 db 20  dc 20 dd 20 de 20 df 0a  |脴 脵 脷 脹 脺 脻 脼 脽.|
000000c0  e0 20 e1 20 e2 20 e3 20  e4 20 e5 20 e6 20 e7 20  |脿 谩 芒 茫 盲 氓 忙 莽 |
000000d0  e8 20 e9 20 ea 20 eb 20  ec 20 ed 20 ee 20 ef 0a  |猫 茅 锚 毛 矛 铆 卯 茂.|
000000e0  f0 20 f1 20 f2 20 f3 20  f4 20 f5 20 f6 20 f7 20  |冒 帽 貌 贸 么 玫 枚 梅 |
000000f0  f8 20 f9 20 fa 20 fb 20  fc 20 fd 20 fe 20 ff 0a  |酶 霉 煤 没 眉 媒 镁 每.|
00000100

On my recently updated FreeBSD-11 systems (r317662) many of them are missing.
As a proof of concept I've manually added the MICRO_SIGN, which was originally missing as well.

[58]cicely7> svn diff
Index: en_US.ISO8859-1.src
===================================================================
--- en_US.ISO8859-1.src (revision 317662)
+++ en_US.ISO8859-1.src (working copy)
@@ -2795,6 +2795,7 @@
        <FULLWIDTH_LATIN_SMALL_LETTER_Z>
 
 print  <space>;/
+       <MICRO_SIGN>;/
        <EXCLAMATION_MARK>;/
        <QUOTATION_MARK>;/
        <NUMBER_SIGN>;/
[59]cicely7> hexdump -C ~/umlauts
00000000  80 20 81 20 82 20 83 20  84 20 85 20 86 20 87 20  |. . . . . . . . |
00000010  88 20 89 20 8a 20 8b 20  8c 20 8d 20 8e 20 8f 0a  |. . . . . . . ..|
00000020  90 20 91 20 92 20 93 20  94 20 95 20 96 20 97 20  |. . . . . . . . |
00000030  98 20 99 20 9a 20 9b 20  9c 20 9d 20 9e 20 9f 0a  |. . . . . . . ..|
00000040  a0 20 a1 20 a2 20 a3 20  a4 20 a5 20 a6 20 a7 20  |. . . . . . . . |
00000050  a8 20 a9 20 aa 20 ab 20  ac 20 ad 20 ae 20 af 0a  |. . 陋 . . . . ..|
00000060  b0 20 b1 20 b2 20 b3 20  b4 20 b5 20 b6 20 b7 20  |. . . . . 碌 . . |
00000070  b8 20 b9 20 ba 20 bb 20  bc 20 bd 20 be 20 bf 0a  |. . 潞 . . . . ..|
00000080  c0 20 c1 20 c2 20 c3 20  c4 20 c5 20 c6 20 c7 20  |脌 脕 脗 脙 脛 脜 脝 脟 |
00000090  c8 20 c9 20 ca 20 cb 20  cc 20 cd 20 ce 20 cf 0a  |脠 脡 脢 脣 脤 脥 脦 脧.|
000000a0  d0 20 d1 20 d2 20 d3 20  d4 20 d5 20 d6 20 d7 20  |脨 脩 脪 脫 脭 脮 脰 . |
000000b0  d8 20 d9 20 da 20 db 20  dc 20 dd 20 de 20 df 0a  |脴 脵 脷 脹 脺 脻 脼 脽.|
000000c0  e0 20 e1 20 e2 20 e3 20  e4 20 e5 20 e6 20 e7 20  |脿 谩 芒 茫 盲 氓 忙 莽 |
000000d0  e8 20 e9 20 ea 20 eb 20  ec 20 ed 20 ee 20 ef 0a  |猫 茅 锚 毛 矛 铆 卯 茂.|
000000e0  f0 20 f1 20 f2 20 f3 20  f4 20 f5 20 f6 20 f7 20  |冒 帽 貌 贸 么 玫 枚 . |
000000f0  f8 20 f9 20 fa 20 fb 20  fc 20 fd 20 fe 20 ff 0a  |酶 霉 煤 没 眉 媒 镁 每.|
00000100

I hope all the special characters make it through the webinterface.
